chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-2398 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For hearing of Misc. No. 11527/23. 2) For hearing of main case. 10.08.2023. None present for the Petitioner. _________ Pursuant to issuance of notice Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali undertakes on behalf of Mr. Sajjad Solangi, Advocate that he would be filing Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceeding initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before Commissioner (Appeals-V), Inland Revenue Karachi. It appears that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner, to which Counsel holds brief for the Respondents concedes. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals-V) Inland Revenue Karachi to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas, during such period the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with listed application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
